items.title: GPT-5.4 Released — 1M Token Context + Computer Use
items.summary: OpenAI drops GPT-5.4 with massive 1M token context window and native computer-use capabilities. Available via API and ChatGPT.

items.title: Claude Opus 4.6 — New SWE-bench Leader at 75.6%
items.summary: Anthropic's Claude Opus 4.6 sets new SWE-bench record for coding performance. Extended thinking and 1M context support.

items.title: DeepSeek V4 — 1 Trillion Parameter Open-Weight Model
items.summary: DeepSeek releases V4 with 1T parameters as open-weight. Competitive with GPT-5.4 and Claude 4.6 on key benchmarks at fraction of the cost.

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite — Ultra-Efficient Google Model
items.summary: Google ships Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite optimized for speed and cost. Strong performance on lightweight tasks.

items.title: OLMo Hybrid — Allen AI's Open Architecture
items.summary: Allen Institute releases OLMo Hybrid combining dense and sparse attention for improved efficiency. Fully open-source.

items.title: Yann LeCun's AMI Raises $1.03B Seed Round
items.summary: Meta's former Chief Scientist raises over $1B in seed funding for AMI, focused on next-gen AI infrastructure and research.

items.title: Cursor in $50B Valuation Talks
items.summary: AI coding assistant Cursor is in funding talks at a $50B valuation, reflecting explosive growth in AI developer tools.

items.title: Nvidia Invests in Thinking Machines + 1GW Data Center Deal
items.summary: Nvidia makes strategic investment in Thinking Machines and announces 1GW data center partnership for next-gen GPU clusters.

items.title: Nvidia GTC — $1T in Chip Orders Previewed
items.summary: At GTC 2026, Nvidia previews massive order pipeline for next-gen chips. AI infrastructure spending shows no signs of slowing.

items.title: Anthropic-Pentagon Partnership Sparks Debate
items.summary: Anthropic's partnership with the US Department of Defense draws both praise and criticism from the AI safety community.

items.title: OpenClaw Hits 280K+ GitHub Stars — Most Starred Ever
items.summary: OpenClaw becomes the most starred project in GitHub history, surpassing all previous records. Massive community growth continues.

items.title: NYT: China Rapidly Adopting OpenClaw
items.summary: New York Times features deep-dive on how OpenClaw is being rapidly adopted across China for enterprise and personal AI workflows.

items.title: LangChain Deep Agents — Complex Task Orchestration
items.summary: LangChain launches Deep Agents for building AI systems that handle complex multi-step tasks with persistent memory.

items.title: Google Conductor — CLI Extension for AI Workflows
items.summary: Google releases Conductor, a CLI extension for orchestrating AI workflows directly from the terminal.

items.title: OpenAI Workspace Analytics for Enterprise
items.summary: OpenAI launches enterprise analytics dashboard for tracking AI usage, costs, and performance across organizations.
